page_content:
MATH734 Algebraic Topology (3 Credits)

Singular homology and cohomology, cup products, Poincare duality, Eilenberg-Steenrod axioms, Whitehead and Hurewicz theorems, universal coefficient theorem, cellular homology.

Prerequisite: MATH600; and MATH432 or MATH730; or students

who have taken courses with comparable content may contact the department.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]

MATH740 Fundamental Concepts of Differential Geometry (3 Credits) Manifolds, tangent vectors and differential forms, Riemannian metrics, connections, curvature, structure equations, geodesics, calculus of variations.

Prerequisite: MATH405, MATH411, and MATH730; or students who have taken courses with comparable content may contact the department.
